salesNavigatorSearchUrl.title: Sales Navigator Search URL
salesNavigatorSearchUrl.description: Paste your LinkedIn Sales Navigator company search URL

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of companies to scrape

cookieString.title: LinkedIn Cookie String (must include li_at)
cookieString.description: Paste browser cookies from linkedin.com (include li_at). Without valid cookies LinkedIn usually redirects to login/checkpoint.

maxProxyAttempts.title: Max Proxy Attempts
maxProxyAttempts.description: How many fresh Apify proxy sessions to try when LinkedIn blocks one.

proxyGroups.title: Proxy Groups
proxyGroups.description: Optional Apify proxy groups, e.g. ["RESIDENTIAL"]. Free/datacenter proxies are frequently blocked by LinkedIn.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy Country
proxyCountry.description: Optional country code for proxy IP location, e.g. US.

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Enable Apify Proxy. Disable this if your account/IP can access LinkedIn directly or when testing without proxies.
